title: Jetpack Bees [Fresh Animations]
body:

# THIS RESOURCEPACK REQUIRES FRESH ANIMATIONS
![load order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/387064ff7d6d5f141a6ad0cd033c6f0edb60b9c9.png)

<details>
<summary>How to get the bee</summary>
Rename your Bee to either "Barry" "Barry B. Benson" or "Jetpack Bee"


</details>
